title: Project Engineer
description:
Job Posting: Project Engineer


Salary: SGD 3,000 to SGD 5,000


About the Role

Our client is looking for a Project Engineer to join their team and support seamless day-to-day operations.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist the Project Manager by coordinating subcontractors, ensuring compliance with project plans and timelines, and reviewing technical drawings for accuracy.
  • Perform site inspections to ensure quality, safety, and specifications compliance; resolved technical issues to prevent project delays.
  • Maintain project records, tracked scope changes, and report project progress to the Project Manager.
  • Provide on site technical support and coordinate issue resolution to minimize disruptions.
  • Ensure that all site activities comply with health, safety, and environmental regulation.
  • Any other duties as assigned by the superior.

Requirements:

  • At least Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or related fields.
  • Minimum of 2 years of experience as Project Engineer or in a similar role in construction industry (civil, structural, or architectural works)
  • Proficient in Microsoft Project

Work Schedule

6 days’ work week.


How to Apply: Interested candidates are invited to apply through the job portal.


All applications will be treated in the strictest confidence. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Victoria Tan (EA Reg No: R25127551)

"Empowering Progress, Inspiring Solutions"

Trific Solutions Pte Ltd (EA Licence Number: 23C1893)


By submitting any application or resume to us, you will be deemed to have agreed & consented to us collecting, using, retaining & disclosing your personal information to prospective employers for their consideration.

postedCompany.description:
At Trific Solutions, we believe in the power of transformation and progress. Our journey began with a vision to create a consultancy that goes beyond the ordinary, one that empowers businesses, nurtures talents, and shapes a brighter future. We are a dedicated team of professionals, passionate about driving positive change in the realms of Human Resources, Education, Business Consultancy, and Digital Marketing.


Our Brand Story:

Trific Solutions was founded in the vibrant city of Singapore, where innovation and diversity converge to create an unparalleled business landscape. Inspired by this dynamic environment, we set out to provide a comprehensive suite of services tailored to meet the unique challenges faced by organizations today.

Our name, "Trific," derives from the fusion of "Terrific" and "Strategic," signifying our commitment to delivering outstanding, forward-thinking solutions. As we embarked on this journey, our mission was clear: to empower businesses with strategic insights, transform educational paradigms, optimize HR processes, and elevate brand presence through cutting-edge digital marketing strategies.


What sets us apart is our unwavering dedication to our clients' success. We understand that every organization is unique, with its own aspirations and hurdles to overcome. Thus, our approach is rooted in a deep understanding of our clients' needs, allowing us to tailor bespoke solutions that drive tangible results.

Our team comprises experts in their respective fields, from seasoned HR consultants to skilled educators, accomplished business strategists, and creative digital marketers. Together, we form a cohesive unit, united by a passion for excellence and a shared commitment to making a positive impact.


With Trific Solutions, you gain a partner that not only provides solutions but also instills a culture of continuous improvement. We believe that knowledge is the catalyst for growth, and we are dedicated to equipping individuals and organizations with the tools they need to thrive in an ever-evolving world.


As we move forward, we remain steadfast in our values of integrity, innovation, and collaboration. These principles guide every interaction we have and every decision we make, ensuring that our clients receive nothing less than the best.


Join us on this transformative journey. Together, let's unlock the full potential of your business, unlock new horizons in education, and unlock the digital prowess to reach greater heights. Trific Solutions is here to illuminate the path to success, and we invite you to be part of this exciting expedition.

Welcome to Trific Solutions, where possibilities become realities, and success knows no bounds.


Trific Solutions Pte Ltd (EA License No: 23C1893) 

"Empowering Progress, Inspiring Solutions"

www.trificsolutions.com
